articles.title: Polkadot: What a surge in network activity means for DOT prices
articles.description: Polkadot experienced a significant surge in price within the last 24 hours, coinciding with increased activity.

articles.title: How Solana Briefly Overtook BNB, Became 4th Largest Crypto
articles.description: Solana briefly overtook BNB as the fourth largest cryptocurrency, surpassing BNB. Can it push even higher?

articles.title: Solana Beats Ethereum in DEX Volume for Third Day, Nears $100 Price
articles.description: Solana has emerged as a frontrunner in the cryptocurrency market this week, experiencing a remarkable surge that culminated in printing two bullish Marabozu candlesticks over the past two days.

articles.title: Solana DEX surpasses Ethereum in transaction volume in one week
articles.description: Solana’s decentralized exchanges (DEXs) have achieved a notable milestone, surpassing Ethereum in transaction volume over the last week. According to Defi Llama data, the DEXs recorded a total volume of $9.03 billion, outpacing Ethereum’s $8.836 billion in the same period. This achievement is attributed to the blockchain’s surging DEX activity, largely fueled by lower gas […]

articles.title: Solana Flips BNB To Become 4th-Largest Crypto, Is Ethereum Next
articles.description: Solana has had one of the best price journeys this year, increasing an outstanding 665% since January. The cryptocurrency has particularly done well in the last quarter of the year, registering price gains that were practically absent for the majority of the year. This week, SOL flipped BNB to become the 4th largest cryptocurrency and second-largest altcoin by market cap. At this rate,...

articles.title: U.S. SEC Frowns at New Addition in BlackRock’s Updated ETF Filing
articles.description: BlackRock nears Bitcoin ETF launch, facing SEC scrutiny over using a third-party broker and Coinbase as custodian.

articles.title: Solana Inches Closer to $100, Overtakes BNB in Market Cap Rankings
articles.description: Since Monday, Solana (SOL) has rallied by over 45%, approaching the much-awaited $100 mark. It has flipped Binance’s BNB to become the cryptocurrency with 4th largest market capitalization. The collapse of FTX adversely impacted the Solana ecosystem’s price and total value locked (TVL). In December last year, it hit a long-term low of $8. However, in 2023, Solana made a solid recovery,...

articles.title: I Dumped Sol and Bought ETH: Arthur Hayes Announces
articles.description: BitMEX's Arthur Hayes switches from Solana to Ethereum after a 'divine message', predicts Ethereum to hit $5,000

articles.title: Elon Musk says X will launch payment services by mid-2024
articles.description: Elon Musk, the owner of X, expects to launch payment services as early as the middle of 2024.
